caption:
In just over two weeks we welcome legendary Argentinian producer Chancha Via Circuito to Movimientos to celebrate our 20th anniversary🔊🎊, plus the incredible vocal and percussive group Baque Luar play live🎶 as well as DJ sets from UK Latinx icon Bushbby, Afro-Caribbean specialist Amancai alongside Movimientos djs and special guests - powered by the mighty Suena Bien Soundsystem - it’s a friends and family affair of course. 

Almost half the tickets are gone don’t miss this special occasion🎇

Alsooo we know the cost of living is real rn and believe everyone should have access to our events, plus we want to make sure all the special ones are there for this night so if you’re hard up hit us up for a reduced ticket concession link 🎟️🎟️🎟️
